data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for effective windows and revocation/suspension lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Effective windows and revocation/suspension lifecycle', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding this lifecycle. The linked use case outlines the need for such functionality, yet there is no evidence that this has been implemented or validated in the current saga run. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: No evidence of effective windows and revocation/suspension lifecycle.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
